narrative:
Milford Township has 1,415 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
